'''鈭歜-y-g-g''' ('''kabaygegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xeroprint|xeroprint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xeroprint|xeroprint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-y-g-g
|-
! Lemma
| kabaygegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibaygegoko|thibaygegoko]] || [[word:jibaygegoko|jibaygegoko]] || [[word:shibaygegoko|shibaygegoko]] || [[word:kibaygegoko|kibaygegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubaygegoko|thuthubaygegoko]] || [[word:jujubaygegoko|jujubaygegoko]] || [[word:shushubaygegoko|shushubaygegoko]] || [[word:kukubaygegoko|kukubaygegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubaygegoko|thubaygegoko]] || [[word:jubaygegoko|jubaygegoko]] || [[word:shubaygegoko|shubaygegoko]] || [[word:kubaygegoko|kubaygegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubaygegoko|thubaygegoko]] || [[word:jubaygegoko|jubaygegoko]] || [[word:shubaygegoko|shubaygegoko]] || [[word:kubaygegoko|kubaygegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebaygegoko|thebaygegoko]] || [[word:jebaygegoko|jebaygegoko]] || [[word:shebaygegoko|shebaygegoko]] || [[word:kebaygegoko|kebaygegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobaygegoko|thothobaygegoko]] || [[word:jojobaygegoko|jojobaygegoko]] || [[word:shoshobaygegoko|shoshobaygegoko]] || [[word:kokobaygegoko|kokobaygegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobaygegoko|thobaygegoko]] || [[word:jobaygegoko|jobaygegoko]] || [[word:shobaygegoko|shobaygegoko]] || [[word:kobaygegoko|kobaygegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobaygegoko|thobaygegoko]] || [[word:jobaygegoko|jobaygegoko]] || [[word:shobaygegoko|shobaygegoko]] || [[word:kobaygegoko|kobaygegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙baygegoko|th忙baygegoko]] || [[word:j忙baygegoko|j忙baygegoko]] || [[word:sh忙baygegoko|sh忙baygegoko]] || [[word:k忙baygegoko|k忙baygegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabaygegoko|thathabaygegoko]] || [[word:jajabaygegoko|jajabaygegoko]] || [[word:shashabaygegoko|shashabaygegoko]] || [[word:kakabaygegoko|kakabaygegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabaygegoko|thabaygegoko]] || [[word:jabaygegoko|jabaygegoko]] || [[word:shabaygegoko|shabaygegoko]] || [[word:kabaygegoko|kabaygegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabaygegoko|thabaygegoko]] || [[word:jabaygegoko|jabaygegoko]] || [[word:shabaygegoko|shabaygegoko]] || [[word:kabaygegoko|kabaygegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
